Name: Sword
Description: A standard melee weapon. Grants S+0, no special rules.

Name: Shield
Description: Grants +1 Armour Save in close combat.

Name: Spear
Description: Fight in extra rank. +1 Strength on the charge.

Name: Lance
Description: Cavalry weapon. +2 Strength on the charge, then counts as a hand weapon.

Name: Magic Staff
Description: Required to cast spells. Grants +1 to all casting rolls.
